input.style: bg-slate-950 border-slate-800 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500 transition-colors

chat_bubble.ai: bg-slate-800 text-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4 max-w-[85%] border-l-4 border-emerald-500 shadow-sm
chat_bubble.user: bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-lg p-4 max-w-[85%] ml-auto shadow-md

hero_background.usage: Use as a subtle background overlay with low opacity (10-20%) on the landing page to give depth.

fallback_background.usage: Alternative background if the primary is too distracting.

structure: Hero Section: Centered layout. Headline: 'Master Your Tech Interview'. Subhead: 'AI-powered mock interviews tailored for Indian developers.'
Role Selection: Grid of 3 Cards (Frontend, Backend, Full Stack). Each card must be interactive with hover effects.
Experience Selection: Simple toggle or segmented control (Fresher, 1-3 years, 3+ years).
landing.styles: min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center items-center relative overflow-hidden

structure: Header: Minimal. Shows current role/level and 'End Session' button (ghost variant).
Chat Area: Central scrollable area. Messages appear from bottom. Use 'chat_bubble' component styles.
Input Area: Fixed at bottom. Textarea with auto-resize. Send button on right.
Feedback Area: Optional floating panel or inline message for AI feedback after each answer.
Score Card: Large circular progress or clean number display (e.g., '8/10').
Feedback List: Accordion or list of questions with detailed AI feedback.

global_css: Set `html { class='dark' }` to force dark mode.
Update tailwind.config.js to extend colors with the provided palette.
components: Use Shadcn UI components as the base but override styles using the `className` prop to match the 'Anti-AI' aesthetic defined in `components` section.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA (The provided palette is pre-checked).
Use semantic HTML (main, section, article, button).

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text. It reduces readability.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use the provided #020617 or #0f172a.
Do NOT center align long text blocks. Left align for readability.
All buttons must have a hover state that is visibly distinct.
Animations should be subtle (opacity/transform), never layout-shifting.
